name: Cream Puff Cake
recipeIngredient: chocolate syrup or hot fudge sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine water and butter. Bring to a boil; cook and stir until butter is melted.
2. Add flour and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture leaves the sides of the pan and forms a ball. Remove from heat.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition with an electric mixer.
4. Pour batter into a well-greased 9 x 13-inch pan. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes. Lower temperature to 350°F and bake an additional 15 minutes. Cool completely.
5. Combine pudding mix, milk, and cream cheese; beat until well-blended. Pour over the cream puff layer and refrigerate until pudding is set.
6. Top with Cool Whip. Just before serving, drizzle each piece with chocolate syrup or hot fudge sauce.
